title: Pura Powdered Collagen Supplement (Flex +) | Hydrolysed Collagen Peptides with Vitamin C & Manganese | 284g (28 Servings)
features: Pura Collagen flex+ is a unique, innovative formula that combines a powerful blend of ingredients to naturally enhance the body’s own collagen production and to reduce mobility related joint discomfort.
Every ingredient has a purpose and each serving contains the optimum dose to be effective.
Collagen is the main structural protein in connective tissues, also abundant in cartilage. A healthy cartilage makes joints, strong, mobile and flexible.
Tendoforte Hydrolysed Collagen Peptides and Manganese can help to strengthen ligaments and tendons. Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of bones and cartilage.
Manganese contributes to the maintenance of normal bones and the normal formation of connective tissue. Copper contributes to the maintenance of normal connective tissues.
description: Product Description Pura Collagen flex+ is a unique, innovative formula that combines a powerful blend of ingredients to naturally enhance the body's own collagen production and to reduce mobility related joint discomfort. Every ingredient has a purpose and each serving contains the optimum dose to be effective: Collagen is the main structural protein in connective tissues, also abundant in cartilage. A healthy cartilage makes joints, strong, mobile and flexible. Tendoforte Hydrolysed Collagen Peptides and Manganese can help to strengthen ligaments and tendons. Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of bones and cartilage. Manganese contributes to the maintenance of normal bones and the normal formation of connective tissue. Ingredients Hydrolysed Bovine Collagen Peptides (FORTIGEL, TENDOFORTE), Vitamin C, Manganese Directions Our products can be easily integrated into your daily routine. Simply mix 4 rounded teaspoons twice daily (or one of each twice a day if using together) into your morning cuppa, afternoon pick-me-up coffee, smoothie bowl, or post-workout shake.
